response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, but his expertise is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React) and niche languages (Dlang), with only brief experience in C/C++ (National Instruments role). He lacks recent or significant C++ experience, secure coding practices for industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), and messaging/broker systems critical to this role. His background does not align with the core technical competencies or security expertise required.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and analytical skills demonstrated across diverse roles
Proven ability to architect and deliver scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, direct mail automation)
Experience with DevOps practices, CI/CD, and testing methodologies (TDD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only National Instruments role, 6 months in 2014–2015) and no recent C++ work
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle (SDL)
No experience with message brokers, multi-threading, or high-performance networking required for this role
